completedTasks: Backend scaffold: FastAPI + SQLAlchemy + Alembic + project structure
Module 1 - Auth: register/login, JWT 15min + refresh token (JWT-wrapped UUID), bcrypt rounds=12, server-side revocation
Module 2 - Jobs: CRUD + cursor pagination + filter (status, title, dept, location, emp_type, exp_level, remote_type)
Module 3 - Candidates: CRUD + PDF upload + AI parsing/scoring + pipeline status + application management

AI service: OpenRouter routing + json_schema structured output + multimodal PDF via pymupdf

Fix: job card UX — primary click → candidates list; Edit demoted to secondary footer action
